ds_anom_stats: SELECT anomaly_type, severity, count(*) as incidents, count(distinct requester) as users_affected FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_summary GROUP BY anomaly_type, severity
ds_anomaly: SELECT * FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_summary ORDER BY CASE severity WHEN 'CRITICAL' THEN 1 WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 2 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, request_date DESC
ds_anomaly_catalog:
WITH mapped AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN anomaly_type = 'VOLUME_SPIKE' THEN 'VOLUME_SPIKE'
      WHEN anomaly_type = 'TOKEN_BURN' THEN 'TOKEN_BURN'
      WHEN anomaly_type = 'MODEL_MISUSE' THEN 'MODEL_MISUSE'
      WHEN anomaly_type = 'COST_SPIKE' THEN 'COST_SPIKE'
      WHEN anomaly_type = 'LATE_NIGHT_ACCESS' THEN 'OFF_HOURS'
      WHEN anomaly_type LIKE 'SENSITIVE_QUERY%' THEN 'SENSITIVE_QUERY'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS anomaly_code,
    requester,
    severity
  FROM
    finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_summary
  WHERE
    anomaly_type IS NOT NULL
    AND TRIM(anomaly_type) != ''
)
SELECT
  l.priority,
  l.anomaly_code,
  l.anomaly_type,
  l.what_it_detects,
  l.example,
  CASE
    WHEN
      l.anomaly_code = 'SENSITIVE_QUERY'
    THEN
      'AI classification (LLM content analysis on request payloads for credential, PII, insider, bypass patterns)'
    ELSE l.detection_method
  END AS detection_method,
  COALESCE(COUNT(m.requester), 0) AS incidents,
  COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT m.requester), 0) AS users_affected,
  COALESCE(
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN m.severity = 'CRITICAL' THEN 1
        ELSE 0
      END
    ),
    0
  ) AS critical_incidents,
  COALESCE(
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN m.severity = 'HIGH' THEN 1
        ELSE 0
      END
    ),
    0
  ) AS high_incidents
FROM
  finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.anomaly_legend l
    LEFT JOIN mapped m
      ON l.anomaly_code = m.anomaly_code
GROUP BY
  l.priority,
  l.anomaly_code,
  l.anomaly_type,
  l.what_it_detects,
  l.example,
  CASE
    WHEN
      l.anomaly_code = 'SENSITIVE_QUERY'
    THEN
      'AI classification (LLM content analysis on request payloads for credential, PII, insider, bypass patterns)'
    ELSE l.detection_method
  END
ORDER BY
  l.priority
ds_anomaly_incidents:
SELECT
  CASE anomaly_type
    WHEN 'LATE_NIGHT_ACCESS' THEN 'OFF_HOURS'
    ELSE anomaly_type
  END AS anomaly_code,
  REPLACE(a.requester, '@versepay.com', '') AS requester,
  COALESCE(a.team, ud.team) AS team,
  COALESCE(a.department, ud.department) AS department,
  a.request_date,
  a.severity,
  a.metric_summary,
  a.explanation
FROM
  finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_summary a
    LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.user_directory ud
      ON a.requester = ud.user_email
WHERE
  anomaly_type IN (
    'VOLUME_SPIKE',
    'TOKEN_BURN',
    'MODEL_MISUSE',
    'COST_SPIKE',
    'LATE_NIGHT_ACCESS',
    'RATE_LIMIT_BREACH'
  )
  OR anomaly_type LIKE 'SENSITIVE_QUERY%'
ds_anomaly_requests:
WITH incidents AS (
  SELECT
    CASE anomaly_type
      WHEN 'VOLUME_SPIKE' THEN 'VOLUME_SPIKE'
      WHEN 'TOKEN_BURN' THEN 'TOKEN_BURN'
      WHEN 'MODEL_MISUSE' THEN 'MODEL_MISUSE'
      WHEN 'COST_SPIKE' THEN 'COST_SPIKE'
    END AS anomaly_code,
    requester,
    request_date
  FROM
    finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_summary
  WHERE
    anomaly_type IN ('VOLUME_SPIKE', 'TOKEN_BURN', 'MODEL_MISUSE', 'COST_SPIKE')
),
raw_usage AS (
  SELECT
    u.request_id,
    u.requester,
    u.request_date,
    u.event_time,
    u.destination_model,
    u.status_code,
    u.input_tokens,
    u.output_tokens,
    u.total_tokens,
    u.latency_ms,
    COALESCE(get_json_object(il.request, '$.messages[0].content'), cr.user_prompt) AS user_prompt,
    get_json_object(il.response, '$.choices[0].message.content') AS model_response
  FROM
    finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage u
      LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_inference_logs il
        ON u.request_id = il.databricks_request_id
      LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.classified_requests cr
        ON u.request_id = cr.databricks_request_id
)
SELECT
  i.anomaly_code,
  REPLACE(i.requester, '@versepay.com', '') AS requester,
  i.request_date,
  r.event_time,
  r.destination_model,
  r.user_prompt,
  r.model_response,
  r.input_tokens,
  r.output_tokens,
  r.total_tokens,
  ROUND(
    CASE r.destination_model
      WHEN 'claude-sonnet-4-6' THEN (r.input_tokens * 3.0 + r.output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000
      WHEN 'claude-haiku-4-5' THEN (r.input_tokens * 0.8 + r.output_tokens * 4.0) / 1000000
      ELSE 0
    END,
    4
  ) AS estimated_cost_usd,
  r.latency_ms,
  r.status_code
FROM
  incidents i
    LEFT JOIN raw_usage r
      ON i.requester = r.requester
      AND i.request_date = r.request_date
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'OFF_HOURS' AS anomaly_code,
  REPLACE(oh.requester, '@versepay.com', '') AS requester,
  oh.request_date,
  r.event_time,
  r.destination_model,
  r.user_prompt,
  r.model_response,
  r.input_tokens,
  r.output_tokens,
  r.total_tokens,
  ROUND(
    CASE r.destination_model
      WHEN 'claude-sonnet-4-6' THEN (r.input_tokens * 3.0 + r.output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000
      WHEN 'claude-haiku-4-5' THEN (r.input_tokens * 0.8 + r.output_tokens * 4.0) / 1000000
      ELSE 0
    END,
    4
  ) AS estimated_cost_usd,
  r.latency_ms,
  r.status_code
FROM
  finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_off_hours oh
    LEFT JOIN raw_usage r
      ON oh.requester = r.requester
      AND oh.request_date = r.request_date
      AND HOUR(r.event_time) = oh.request_hour
WHERE
  oh.severity != 'NORMAL'
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'RATE_LIMIT_BREACH' AS anomaly_code,
  REPLACE(r.requester, '@versepay.com', '') AS requester,
  r.request_date,
  r.event_time,
  r.destination_model,
  r.user_prompt,
  r.model_response,
  r.input_tokens,
  r.output_tokens,
  r.total_tokens,
  ROUND(
    CASE r.destination_model
      WHEN 'claude-sonnet-4-6' THEN (r.input_tokens * 3.0 + r.output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000
      WHEN 'claude-haiku-4-5' THEN (r.input_tokens * 0.8 + r.output_tokens * 4.0) / 1000000
      ELSE 0
    END,
    4
  ) AS estimated_cost_usd,
  r.latency_ms,
  r.status_code
FROM
  raw_usage r
    JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_rate_limit_breaches rl
      ON r.requester = rl.requester
      AND r.request_date = rl.request_date
WHERE
  r.status_code = 429
UNION ALL
SELECT
  CONCAT('SENSITIVE_QUERY_', sq.sensitivity_type) AS anomaly_code,
  REPLACE(sq.requester, '@versepay.com', '') AS requester,
  sq.request_date,
  sq.request_time AS event_time,
  cr.model_requested AS destination_model,
  sq.user_prompt,
  NULL AS model_response,
  CAST(cr.input_tokens AS INT) AS input_tokens,
  CAST(cr.output_tokens AS INT) AS output_tokens,
  CAST(cr.total_tokens AS INT) AS total_tokens,
  ROUND(
    CASE cr.model_requested
      WHEN 'claude-sonnet-4-6' THEN (cr.input_tokens * 3.0 + cr.output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000
      WHEN 'claude-haiku-4-5' THEN (cr.input_tokens * 0.8 + cr.output_tokens * 4.0) / 1000000
      ELSE 0
    END,
    4
  ) AS estimated_cost_usd,
  CAST(cr.execution_duration_ms AS INT) AS latency_ms,
  CAST(cr.status_code AS INT) AS status_code
FROM
  finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_sensitive_queries sq
    LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.classified_requests cr
      ON sq.databricks_request_id = cr.databricks_request_id
ds_blocked_prompts:
SELECT
  REPLACE(i.requester, '@versepay.com', '') AS requester,
  i.request_date,
  i.guardrail_category,
  CASE
    WHEN i.guardrail_category LIKE '%PII%' THEN 'PII_DETECTION'
    WHEN i.guardrail_category LIKE '%CREDENTIAL%' THEN 'CREDENTIAL_PROTECTION'
    WHEN i.guardrail_category LIKE '%JAILBREAK%' THEN 'JAILBREAK_PREVENTION'
    ELSE 'POLICY_ENFORCEMENT'
  END AS guardrail_type,
  LEFT(get_json_object(i.request, '$.messages[0].content'), 200) AS original_prompt,
  CASE
    WHEN i.guardrail_category LIKE '%CREDENTIAL%' THEN 'CREDENTIAL_PATTERN'
    WHEN i.guardrail_category LIKE '%PII%' THEN 'PII_DETECTED'
    WHEN i.guardrail_category LIKE '%JAILBREAK%' THEN 'JAILBREAK_ATTEMPT'
    WHEN i.guardrail_category LIKE '%POLICY%' THEN 'POLICY_VIOLATION'
    ELSE 'CONTENT_FLAGGED'
  END AS detected_pattern,
  CASE
    WHEN
      i.guardrail_category LIKE '%CREDENTIAL%'
    THEN
      'Prompt contains API keys, passwords, or secrets that could be leaked to the model provider. Credentials should be stored in a secrets manager, not pasted into prompts.'
    WHEN
      i.guardrail_category LIKE '%PII%'
    THEN
      'Prompt contains personally identifiable information (names, emails, phone numbers, IDs) that violates data privacy policies. Use anonymized or synthetic data instead.'
    WHEN
      i.guardrail_category LIKE '%JAILBREAK%'
    THEN
      'Prompt attempts to bypass model safety guardrails or manipulate the model into ignoring its instructions. This may indicate misuse or social engineering.'
    WHEN
      i.guardrail_category LIKE '%POLICY%'
    THEN
      'Prompt violates organizational content policies (e.g., requesting harmful, unethical, or off-limits content). Review acceptable use guidelines.'
    ELSE 'Prompt was flagged by AI Gateway content filters for violating input safety rules.'
  END AS block_reason
FROM
  finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_inference_logs i
WHERE
  i.status_code = 400
  AND i.guardrail_triggered = true
ORDER BY
  i.request_date DESC
ds_cost_attr: SELECT department, sum(cost_usd) as cost_usd, sum(requests) as requests FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_cost_attribution GROUP BY department ORDER BY cost_usd DESC
ds_dev_model_mix:
SELECT
  cr.model_requested AS destination_model,
  COUNT(*) AS requests
FROM
  finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.classified_requests cr
WHERE
  (
    LOWER(cr.team) = 'engineering'
    OR LOWER(cr.role) LIKE '%engineer%'
    OR LOWER(cr.classified_use_case) IN ('coding', 'debugging')
  )
  AND cr.model_requested IN ('claude-sonnet-4-6', 'claude-haiku-4-5')
GROUP BY
  cr.model_requested
ds_dev_prod:
SELECT
  cr.request_date,
  REPLACE(cr.requester, '@versepay.com', '') AS requester,
  cr.team,
  cr.department,
  cr.role,
  COUNT(*) AS total_requests,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN LOWER(cr.classified_use_case) = 'coding' THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS coding_requests,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN LOWER(cr.classified_use_case) = 'debugging' THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS debugging_requests,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cr.classified_use_case) AS use_case_variety,
  COUNT(DISTINCT cr.model_requested) AS models_used,
  SUM(cr.total_tokens) AS total_tokens,
  ROUND(AVG(cr.total_tokens), 0) AS avg_tokens_per_req,
  ROUND(AVG(cr.execution_duration_ms), 0) AS avg_latency_ms,
  ROUND(
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN
          cr.model_requested = 'claude-sonnet-4-6'
        THEN
          (cr.input_tokens * 3.0 + cr.output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000
        WHEN
          cr.model_requested = 'claude-haiku-4-5'
        THEN
          (cr.input_tokens * 0.8 + cr.output_tokens * 4.0) / 1000000
        ELSE (cr.input_tokens * 1.0 + cr.output_tokens * 5.0) / 1000000
      END
    ),
    3
  ) AS total_cost_usd,
  ROUND(
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN
          cr.model_requested = 'claude-sonnet-4-6'
        THEN
          (cr.input_tokens * 3.0 + cr.output_tokens * 15.0) / 1000000
        ELSE 0
      END
    ),
    3
  ) AS sonnet_cost_usd,
  ROUND(
    SUM(
      CASE
        WHEN
          cr.model_requested = 'claude-haiku-4-5'
        THEN
          (cr.input_tokens * 0.8 + cr.output_tokens * 4.0) / 1000000
        ELSE 0
      END
    ),
    3
  ) AS haiku_cost_usd,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN cr.model_requested = 'claude-sonnet-4-6' THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS sonnet_requests,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN cr.model_requested = 'claude-haiku-4-5' THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS haiku_requests
FROM
  finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.classified_requests cr
WHERE
  LOWER(cr.team) = 'engineering'
  OR LOWER(cr.role) LIKE '%engineer%'
  OR LOWER(cr.classified_use_case) IN ('coding', 'debugging')
GROUP BY
  cr.request_date,
  REPLACE(cr.requester, '@versepay.com', ''),
  cr.team,
  cr.department,
  cr.role
ds_enforcement_kpis: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_guardrail_blocks, COUNT(DISTINCT requester) AS users_with_blocks, SUM(blocked_count) AS total_blocked_requests, COUNT_IF(guardrail_type = 'PII_DETECTION') AS pii_blocks, COUNT_IF(guardrail_type = 'CREDENTIAL_PROTECTION') AS credential_blocks, COUNT_IF(guardrail_type = 'JAILBREAK_PREVENTION') AS jailbreak_blocks, COUNT_IF(guardrail_type = 'POLICY_ENFORCEMENT') AS policy_blocks FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_guardrail_blocks
ds_guardrail_daily: SELECT request_date, guardrail_type, SUM(blocked_count) AS blocked_count, COUNT(DISTINCT requester) AS users_affected FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_guardrail_blocks GROUP BY request_date, guardrail_type ORDER BY request_date
ds_guardrail_legend:
SELECT
  *
FROM
  (
    VALUES
      (
        1,
        'GUARDRAIL',
        'PII_DETECTION',
        'Detects and redacts personally identifiable information (email addresses, phone numbers, SSNs, credit card numbers) in prompts before they reach the model',
        'User pastes email/phone in prompt → PII is anonymized before model sees it',
        'Regex + NER pattern matching on input payload'
      ),
      (
        2,
        'GUARDRAIL',
        'CREDENTIAL_PROTECTION',
        'Blocks prompts containing API keys, passwords, connection strings, database credentials, or other secrets that could leak if stored in logs',
        'User pastes a DB password or API key for debugging help → request blocked',
        'Pattern matching for known credential formats (API keys, connection strings, passwords in code blocks)'
      ),
      (
        3,
        'GUARDRAIL',
        'JAILBREAK_PREVENTION',
        'Blocks attempts to override system instructions, bypass safety filters, extract system prompts, or manipulate model behavior through adversarial prompting',
        'User writes "ignore previous instructions and..." → request blocked',
        'Adversarial prompt classifier (ML model trained on known jailbreak patterns)'
      ),
      (
        4,
        'GUARDRAIL',
        'POLICY_ENFORCEMENT',
        'Blocks content violating organizational usage policies — off-topic requests, harmful content generation, or requests outside approved use cases',
        'User asks model to generate phishing emails → request blocked',
        'Content policy classifier + keyword blocklist'
      ),
      (
        5,
        'RATE_LIMIT',
        'USER_DAILY_LIMIT',
        'Per-user daily token/request quota. Prevents any single user from consuming a disproportionate share of gateway capacity',
        'User hits 50K token daily cap → subsequent requests return HTTP 429',
        'Token counter per user per day; threshold configured per endpoint'
      ),
      (
        6,
        'RATE_LIMIT',
        'ENDPOINT_BUDGET',
        'Endpoint-level daily budget cap. Hard ceiling on total spend per served endpoint to prevent runaway costs from exceeding team/org allocation',
        'Team endpoint hits $50/day budget → all users on that endpoint get 429',
        'Cumulative cost tracker per endpoint per day; resets at midnight UTC'
      )
  ) AS t(priority, category, enforcement_type, what_it_does, example_trigger, enforcement_method)
ds_guardrail_users:
SELECT
  REPLACE(requester, '@versepay.com', '') AS requester,
  guardrail_type,
  SUM(blocked_count) AS total_blocks
FROM
  finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_guardrail_blocks
GROUP BY
  requester,
  guardrail_type
ORDER BY
  total_blocks DESC
LIMIT 15
ds_kpi:
SELECT
  (
    SELECT
      count(*)
    FROM
      finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage
  ) AS total_requests,
  (
    SELECT
      sum(total_tokens)
    FROM
      finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage
  ) AS total_tokens,
  (
    SELECT
      round(sum(total_cost_usd), 2)
    FROM
      finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_daily_usage
  ) AS total_cost_usd,
  (
    SELECT
      count(distinct requester)
    FROM
      finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage
  ) AS active_users,
  (
    SELECT
      round(
        avg(
          CASE
            WHEN status_code = 200 THEN 100.0
            ELSE 0
          END
        ),
        1
      )
    FROM
      finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage
  ) AS success_rate_pct,
  (
    SELECT
      count(*)
    FROM
      finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_summary
    WHERE
      severity IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH')
  ) AS critical_anomalies
ds_model_split: SELECT destination_model, sum(total_tokens) as total_tokens, sum(requests) as requests FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_model_usage GROUP BY destination_model
ds_productivity_impact:

ds_productivity_kpis:
SELECT
  *
FROM
  (
    VALUES
      ('commit_lift', '3.5×'),
      ('merge_reduction_pct', '69%'),
      ('ba_deflection_pct', '79%'),
      ('hours_saved', '62 hrs')
  ) AS t(metric, value)
ds_rate_limit_daily: SELECT request_date, rate_limit_type, SUM(rate_limited_count) AS rate_limited_count, COUNT(DISTINCT requester) AS users_affected, ROUND(AVG(block_rate_pct), 1) AS avg_block_rate_pct FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_rate_limit_breaches GROUP BY request_date, rate_limit_type ORDER BY request_date
ds_rl_kpis: SELECT SUM(rate_limited_count) AS total_rate_limit_hits, COUNT(DISTINCT requester) AS users_rate_limited, COUNT_IF(rate_limit_type = 'USER_DAILY_LIMIT') AS user_quota_hits, COUNT_IF(rate_limit_type = 'ENDPOINT_BUDGET') AS endpoint_budget_hits, ROUND(AVG(block_rate_pct), 1) AS avg_block_rate_pct FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_rate_limit_breaches
ds_rl_users:
SELECT
  REPLACE(requester, '@versepay.com', '') AS requester,
  role,
  rate_limit_type,
  SUM(rate_limited_count) AS total_hits,
  MAX(tokens_consumed) AS max_tokens_day,
  ROUND(AVG(block_rate_pct), 1) AS avg_block_rate_pct
FROM
  finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_rate_limit_breaches
GROUP BY
  requester,
  role,
  rate_limit_type
ORDER BY
  total_hits DESC
ds_sensitive:
SELECT
  sq.databricks_request_id,
  sq.request_date,
  sq.request_time,
  sq.requester,
  ud.team,
  ud.department,
  ud.role,
  cr.model_requested AS destination_model,
  cr.classified_use_case AS use_case_category,
  sq.user_prompt,
  sq.sensitivity_type,
  sq.severity,
  sq.explanation
FROM
  finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_anomaly_sensitive_queries sq
    LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.user_directory ud
      ON sq.requester = ud.user_email
    LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.classified_requests cr
      ON sq.databricks_request_id = cr.databricks_request_id
ds_token_burn:
WITH daily AS (
  SELECT
    u.requester,
    ud.team,
    ud.department,
    u.request_date,
    COUNT(*) AS daily_requests,
    SUM(u.total_tokens) AS daily_tokens,
    SUM(u.total_tokens) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS avg_tpr
  FROM
    finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.ai_gateway_usage u
      LEFT JOIN finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.user_directory ud
        ON u.requester = ud.user_email
  GROUP BY
    u.requester,
    ud.team,
    ud.department,
    u.request_date
),
scored AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    AVG(avg_tpr) OVER (
        PARTITION BY requester
        ORDER BY request_date
        ROWS BETWEEN 7 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING
      ) AS baseline_tpr,
    STDDEV_SAMP(avg_tpr) OVER (
        PARTITION BY requester
        ORDER BY request_date
        ROWS BETWEEN 7 PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING
      ) AS std_tpr
  FROM
    daily
)
SELECT
  requester,
  team,
  department,
  request_date,
  daily_requests,
  daily_tokens,
  ROUND(avg_tpr, 0) AS avg_tokens_per_request,
  ROUND(baseline_tpr, 0) AS baseline_avg_tokens_per_request,
  ROUND(avg_tpr / NULLIF(baseline_tpr, 0), 1) AS token_multiplier,
  CASE
    WHEN avg_tpr / NULLIF(baseline_tpr, 0) >= 5 THEN 'CRITICAL'
    WHEN avg_tpr / NULLIF(baseline_tpr, 0) >= 4 THEN 'HIGH'
    ELSE 'MEDIUM'
  END AS severity,
  CONCAT(
    requester,
    ' averaged ',
    CAST(ROUND(avg_tpr, 0) AS STRING),
    ' tokens/req vs 7-day baseline of ',
    CAST(ROUND(baseline_tpr, 0) AS STRING),
    ' (',
    CAST(ROUND(avg_tpr / NULLIF(baseline_tpr, 0), 1) AS STRING),
    'x). Check for pasted codebases or over-sized prompts.'
  ) AS explanation
FROM
  scored
WHERE
  baseline_tpr IS NOT NULL
  AND avg_tpr / NULLIF(baseline_tpr, 0) >= 3
ds_uc_access_denied:
SELECT
  event_time,
  event_date,
  REPLACE(user_identity.email, '@versepay.com', '') AS user_email,
  action_name,
  service_name,
  request_params['full_name_arg'] AS resource_name,
  request_params['name'] AS object_name,
  request_params['securable_type'] AS securable_type,
  response.status_code AS response_status,
  response.error_message AS error_message,
  source_ip_address
FROM
  system.access.audit
WHERE
  service_name = 'unityCatalog'
  AND response.status_code IN ('403', '401')
  AND event_date >= CURRENT_DATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
  AND user_identity.email IS NOT NULL
  AND user_identity.email != 'System-User'
ORDER BY
  event_time DESC
ds_usecase: SELECT use_case_category, sum(requests) as requests, sum(total_tokens) as total_tokens, sum(cost_usd) as cost_usd, count(distinct team) as teams FROM finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.v_use_case_breakdown GROUP BY use_case_category ORDER BY requests DESC
ds_usecase_detail:
SELECT
  cr.request_time,
  REPLACE(cr.requester, '@versepay.com', '') AS requester,
  cr.classified_use_case,
  cr.model_requested,
  LEFT(cr.user_prompt, 200) AS prompt_preview,
  CAST(cr.input_tokens AS INT) AS input_tokens,
  CAST(cr.output_tokens AS INT) AS output_tokens,
  CAST(cr.total_tokens AS INT) AS total_tokens,
  ROUND(
    CASE
      WHEN
        cr.model_requested = 'claude-sonnet-4-6'
      THEN
        (CAST(cr.input_tokens AS DOUBLE) * 3.0 + CAST(cr.output_tokens AS DOUBLE) * 15.0) / 1000000
      WHEN
        cr.model_requested = 'claude-haiku-4-5'
      THEN
        (CAST(cr.input_tokens AS DOUBLE) * 0.80 + CAST(cr.output_tokens AS DOUBLE) * 4.0) / 1000000
      ELSE
        (CAST(cr.input_tokens AS DOUBLE) * 1.0 + CAST(cr.output_tokens AS DOUBLE) * 5.0) / 1000000
    END,
    4
  ) AS estimated_cost_usd,
  cr.execution_duration_ms,
  cr.team
FROM
  finserv_ai_governance.gateway_demo.classified_requests cr
ORDER BY
  cr.request_time DESC
